_publications._publicationTitle: Clinician Perspectives of a Magnetic Resonance Imaging-Based 3D Volumetric Analysis Tool for Neurofibromatosis Type 2-Related Schwannomatosis: Qualitative Pilot Study.

_contextSnippet: the interviewed clinicians also expressed concerns about how they would determine the clinical implications of volume measurements... DICE scores can be used as a metric to evaluate the differences in voxel selection within each scan between clinicians
details: Clinicians expressed concerns about determining clinical implications of volume measurements due to lack of familiarity with volumetric trends compared to linear measurements, requiring correlation studies and multi-center validation with DICE scores for adoption
